title: release_please args

release_type.description: The type of release to use (e.g., node, python, go).

release_please_config_file.description: The path to the release-please configuration file.

release_please_manifest_file.description: The path to the release-please manifest file.

release_please_generate_rolling_tag.description: Whether to generate a rolling tag for releases.

release_please_rolling_tag_name_pattern.description: The pattern for the rolling tag name.

description: This repository is managed with [**release-please**](https://github.com/googleapis/release-please), a tool that automates the creation of release PRs and GitHub tags based on [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/en/v1.0.0/).
